profileId.description: Logical identifier for this neurorights profile.

noNeuralInputsForGovernance.description: If true, neural signals may not be used as inputs to governance, access control, or sanctions.

rights.noscorefrominnerstate.description: If true, no risk/compliance/eligibility score may be derived from inner-domain content (thoughts, beliefs, affect).

noRemoteControlOverBioState.description: If true, BioState/BCI/RoH/FEAR/PAIN may only be altered by host-local, DID-bound kernels, never by remote or off-chain inputs.

disallowedCapabilities.description: Capabilities that are forbidden under this profile.

then.description: Profiles with noRemoteControlOverBioState = true MUST reject modules declaring remote biophysical control capabilities.
